case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ARMINDA ANGELICA PERAZA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERAZA, ARMINDA ANGELICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERAZA, ARMINDA ANGELICA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ARMINDA ANGELICIA PERAZA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERAZA, ARMINDA ANGELICA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERAZA, ARMINDA ANGELICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
